enum.name: MAV_STATE
enum.description: Current operational system status state flags[cite: 1412, 1516].

enum.name: MAV_TYPE
enum.description: Type of the component system specification layout[cite: 1411, 1515].

enum.name: MAV_AUTOPILOT
enum.description: Type of autopilot framework tracking index flags[cite: 1411, 1516].

enum.name: MAV_RESULT
enum.description: The result of the command execution status tracking[cite: 1441, 1503].

enum.name: GPS_FIX_TYPE
enum.description: Type of GNSS position fix quality solution[cite: 1623].

message.name: HEARTBEAT
message.description: System heartbeat indicating a node (COMP, HC, or GCS) is alive and transmitting its core configuration parameters[cite: 1401, 1510, 1511].
message.field: A bitmask or unique index of custom mode parameters; not used/zero default[cite: 1412, 1516].
Type of the component transmitting the heartbeat framework[cite: 1411, 1515].
Autopilot framework indicator flag type[cite: 1411, 1516].
Base mode hardware execution bitmask flags[cite: 1412, 1516].
Current operational state flag of the transmitting system[cite: 1412, 1516].
Automated protocol version validation tracker index[cite: 1412, 1516].

message.name: SYSTEM_TIME
message.description: Provides the synchronized timestamp baseline parameters directly from the Main Compute clock layer[cite: 1584, 1614].
message.field: Unix Epoch Timestamp: The absolute current time in microseconds since Jan 1, 1970 (UTC)[cite: 1615].
Uptime Timestamp: The relative time in milliseconds since the compute node was powered on[cite: 1616].

message.name: GPS_RAW_INT
message.description: Transmits raw, unfiltered GNSS navigation data back over telemetry streams[cite: 1584, 1618].
message.field: Timestamp (UNIX Epoch time or time since system boot) in microseconds[cite: 1619].
Latitude (WGS84), expressed in degrees * 1E7[cite: 1620].
Longitude (WGS84), expressed in degrees * 1E7[cite: 1620].
Altitude (MSL), expressed in millimeters[cite: 1620, 1621].
Accuracy of the horizontal position, multiplied by 100[cite: 1621].
Accuracy of the vertical position, multiplied by 100 [Not Used][cite: 1622].
Speed of vehicle calculated by GNSS, expressed in cm/s[cite: 1622].
Direction of the movement of vehicle, unit: centidegree (divide by 100 for raw degree)[cite: 1622].
GNSS position solution fix quality tracking state[cite: 1623].
Number of satellites visible to the receiver backend array[cite: 1623].

message.name: MANUAL_CONTROL
message.description: Transmits manual steering reference coordinates from either the Hand Controller ADC maps or Ground Control Station sticks[cite: 1405, 1467, 1513, 1556].
message.field: Forward/Backward movement tracking vector metric range[cite: 1471, 1559].
Left/Right lateral translation axis coordinate mapping[cite: 1472, 1560].
Z-axis control displacement parameters mapping index (disabled/static max payload filter)[cite: 1472, 1560].
Rotational yaw control steering index metrics registry map (disabled/static max payload filter)[cite: 1472, 1560].
16-bit bitmap tracking physical execution switches/buttons on the controller infrastructure[cite: 1473, 1560].
Extension Field: Secondary switch matrix tracking registry map (bitmap for buttons 17-32)[cite: 1473, 1561].
Target execution system node component pointer routing index destination validation[cite: 1470, 1558].
Extension Field: Bitmask tracking active axis/override indices mappings[cite: 1473, 1561].
Extension: Pitch-only custom mapping tracking scale parameter registry placeholder[cite: 1474, 1562].
Extension: Roll-only custom mapping tracking scale parameter registry placeholder[cite: 1474, 1562].
Extension: Auxiliary sensor continuous input data channel pipeline sequence 1[cite: 1474, 1562].
Extension: Auxiliary sensor continuous input data channel pipeline sequence 2[cite: 1474, 1562].
Extension: Auxiliary sensor continuous input data channel pipeline sequence 3[cite: 1474, 1562].
Extension: Auxiliary sensor continuous input data channel pipeline sequence 4[cite: 1474, 1562].
Extension: Auxiliary sensor continuous input data channel pipeline sequence 5[cite: 1474, 1562].
Extension: Auxiliary sensor continuous input data channel pipeline sequence 6[cite: 1475, 1562].

message.name: COMMAND_LONG
message.description: Universal target task transaction structure payload handling operational modes, arming requests, lighting, and camera markers[cite: 1401, 1405, 1406, 1511, 1512, 1513, 1577].
message.field: Command Parameter 1: Lookahead custom flags, arm options, light profiles, or camera stream choice[cite: 1435, 1448, 1459, 1497, 1539, 1546, 1553, 1574, 1582].
Command Parameter 2: Custom Main Operating Mode selection, force arm keys, light commands, or range markers[cite: 1435, 1448, 1497, 1539, 1546, 1574, 1582].
Command Parameter 3: Hold state parameters optimization, lighting toggle states, or reserved space[cite: 1436, 1448, 1497, 1540, 1546, 1574, 1582].
Command Parameter 4: Speed sub-mode selection indexing matrices or configuration space variables[cite: 1436, 1459, 1541, 1553, 1582].
Command Parameter 5: Reserved framework task tracking sequence index structure parameters[cite: 1436, 1459, 1541, 1553].
Command Parameter 6: Reserved framework task tracking sequence index structure parameters[cite: 1436, 1459, 1541, 1553].
Command Parameter 7: Reserved framework task tracking sequence index structure parameters[cite: 1436, 1459, 1541, 1553].
The specialized action or task verification identifier matching specific targeted MAV_CMD definitions[cite: 1434, 1447, 1458, 1496, 1538, 1545, 1552, 1571, 1581].
System identification index tracking destination hardware architecture routing links[cite: 1433, 1445, 1457, 1495, 1536, 1543, 1551, 1571, 1579].
Component identification index tracking destination hardware architecture routing links[cite: 1434, 1446, 1457, 1495, 1537, 1544, 1552, 1572, 1580].
Retransmission tracking count tracking parameter indexing sequence variations loop metrics[cite: 1434, 1447, 1458, 1496, 1538, 1545, 1553, 1573, 1581].

message.name: COMMAND_ACK
message.description: Acknowledges transactional execution outcomes generated by an inbound COMMAND_LONG frame packet matrix[cite: 1401, 1405, 1406].
message.field: Extended verification code metrics tracking (additional error diagnostic status information)[cite: 1442, 1453, 1465, 1504].
Echos the command structural processing verification lookup code being acknowledged back to source[cite: 1441, 1452, 1464, 1503].
System status command execution response rating output matrix tracking code[cite: 1441, 1452, 1465, 1503].
Execution timeline tracking threshold sequence mapping metric checklist percentages[cite: 1442, 1453, 1465, 1504].
System identifier index mapping tracking code location target validation endpoint destination[cite: 1442, 1453, 1465, 1504].
Component identifier index mapping tracking code location target validation endpoint destination[cite: 1442, 1453, 1465, 1504].

message.name: RADIO_STATUS
message.description: Wireless data link structural transmission connectivity monitoring parameters matrix[cite: 1405, 1482].
message.field: Hardware data packet dropping tracking index error parsing metrics registry[cite: 1485].
Forward error correction diagnostic check validation routine performance counter[cite: 1486].
Local node received signal strength environment tracking calculation validation scale indexing[cite: 1487].
Remote link node received signal strength tracking measurement parameter data return register[cite: 1487].
Transmitter ring buffer available memory storage space allocation capacity percentage index[cite: 1488].
Local background electromagnetic noise profile metric scale interference register values[cite: 1490].
Remote baseline environment electromagnetic background noise profiling validation scale parameters mapping[cite: 1490].

message.name: TIMESYNC
message.description: Time synchronization routing mechanism frame enabling latency parsing calculations based on cross link round trip delays[cite: 1401, 1405, 1511, 1512].
message.field: Target node computing system timestamp capture entry marker log index profile[cite: 1421, 1428, 1527, 1531].
Source node computing system timestamp capture entry marker log index profile[cite: 1423, 1428, 1528, 1532].
Target system designation identity validator point reference index mapping location[cite: 1423, 1428, 1528, 1532].
Target component designation identity validator point reference index mapping location[cite: 1423, 1429, 1529, 1533].

message.name: COMP_UGV_STATUS
message.description: Aggregated structural state information diagnostic broadcast telemetry matrix capturing real-time UGV data layers[cite: 1584, 1585].
message.field: Rear motor controller voltage tracking state loop scale [Resolution: 0.1 V][cite: 1603].
Front motor controller voltage tracking state loop scale [Resolution: 0.1 V][cite: 1603].
System timestamp parameter log indicator field: Hour tracking (COMP_SUBSYSTEM_STATE)[cite: 1586, 1612].
System timestamp parameter log indicator field: Minute tracking (COMP_SUBSYSTEM_STATE)[cite: 1587, 1612].
System timestamp parameter log indicator field: Second tracking (COMP_SUBSYSTEM_STATE)[cite: 1587, 1612].
Bit 0-1: Rear MC, Bit 2-3: Front MC, Bit 4-5: HV Bat, Bit 6-7: LV Bat State indices[cite: 1587, 1588].
Bit 0-1: LV PDU, Bit 2-3: DCDC 12V, Bit 4-5: DCDC 5V, Bit 6-7: VCU State indices[cite: 1588, 1589].
Bit 0-1: FL Motor, Bit 2-3: RL Motor, Bit 4-5: FR Motor, Bit 6-7: RR Motor State indices[cite: 1589].
Bit 0-1: UHF, Bit 2-3: LBand, Bit 4-5: Compute, Bit 6-7: Reserved State indices[cite: 1590].
Hardware processing log parameter update validation field: Hour (VCU_POWER_SOC)[cite: 1590, 1612].
Hardware processing log parameter update validation field: Minute (VCU_POWER_SOC)[cite: 1590, 1612].
Hardware processing log parameter update validation field: Second (VCU_POWER_SOC)[cite: 1590, 1612].
Main high-voltage battery residual capability tracking metric percentage loop [0-100%].
Secondary low-voltage battery residual capability tracking metric percentage loop [0-100%].
NEW IN V1.1: Secondary low-voltage battery voltage monitoring layout point [Scale: 0.1 V][cite: 814, 1591].
Stepdown power subsystem output reference diagnostic monitoring scale [Scale: 0.1 V].
Active operational routing structure indexing validation field matching ICD definitions.
Active automated protective constraint threshold layer flag (Hold sub-mode status)[cite: 1591, 1592].
Active velocity boundary configuration settings registry reference profile[cite: 1592].
Active vehicle steering kinematic architecture configuration matrix reference index[cite: 1593].
Active mechanical power transmission interlock authorization state flag[cite: 1593].
Target configuration validation tracking command tracking register placeholder index[cite: 1593].
Target verification subsystem verification framework register profile track index[cite: 1593].
Target dynamic limits monitoring parameter execution register tracking placeholder index[cite: 1593].
Target kinematic control architecture reference register profile track index[cite: 1594].
Target safety status interlock requested validation flag monitor track index[cite: 1594].
State machine mode transition execution diagnostic trigger tracking index[cite: 1594].
System update log parameters structural data metric entry index: Hour (VCU_DRIVE_HEALTH)[cite: 1594, 1612].
System update log parameters structural data metric entry index: Minute (VCU_DRIVE_HEALTH)[cite: 1594, 1612].
System update log parameters structural data metric entry index: Second (VCU_DRIVE_HEALTH)[cite: 1594, 1612].
Bitfield mask identifying discrete bit-wise anomalies in Rear Left traction motor[cite: 1595].
Bitfield mask identifying discrete bit-wise anomalies in Rear Right traction motor[cite: 1596].
Bitfield mask identifying discrete bit-wise anomalies in Front Left traction motor[cite: 1597, 1598].
Bitfield mask identifying discrete bit-wise anomalies in Front Right traction motor[cite: 1599, 1600].
Bitfield mapping for structural component drive issues inside Rear Power Controller[cite: 1600, 1601].
Bitfield mapping for structural component drive issues inside Front Power Controller[cite: 1601, 1602].
Thermal profiling index measuring internal Rear Power Stage junction temperature[cite: 1603].
Thermal profiling index measuring internal Front Power Stage junction temperature[cite: 1603].
Power network verification matrix tracking indicator index validation: Hour (VCU_PDU_STATUS)[cite: 1603, 1612].
Power network verification matrix tracking indicator index validation: Minute (VCU_PDU_STATUS)[cite: 1604, 1612].
Power network verification matrix tracking indicator index validation: Second (VCU_PDU_STATUS)[cite: 1604, 1612].
Integrated state allocation map showing discrete high/low line channel relay states[cite: 1604].
Safety circuit confirmation parameters profile tracking index structure: Hour (VCU_ESTOP_STATUS)[cite: 1606, 1612].
Safety circuit confirmation parameters profile tracking index structure: Minute (VCU_ESTOP_STATUS)[cite: 1606, 1612].
Safety circuit confirmation parameters profile tracking index structure: Second (VCU_ESTOP_STATUS)[cite: 1606, 1612].
Bit 0: Emergency logic safety trip status circuit hardware detection switch[cite: 1606].
Interface checking structure parameters data entry validation logging: Hour (COMP_INTERFACE_HEALTH)[cite: 1606, 1607, 1612].
Interface checking structure parameters data entry validation logging: Minute (COMP_INTERFACE_HEALTH)[cite: 1607, 1612].
Interface checking structure parameters data entry validation logging: Second (COMP_INTERFACE_HEALTH)[cite: 1607, 1612].
Bit 0: Actuator CAN, Bit 1: Aux CAN, Bit 2: Ethernet, Bit 3: Serial Hand Controller status indicators[cite: 1607, 1608].
Low level core stack diagnostic monitoring frame metric registration: Hour (VCU_INTERFACE_HEALTH)[cite: 1608, 1612].
Low level core stack diagnostic monitoring frame metric registration: Minute (VCU_INTERFACE_HEALTH)[cite: 1608, 1612].
Low level core stack diagnostic monitoring frame metric registration: Second (VCU_INTERFACE_HEALTH)[cite: 1608, 1612].
Bit 0: Actuator CAN, Bit 1: Control CAN, Bit 2: Aux CAN interface active tracking indicators[cite: 1608, 1609].
External hardware sensor checking diagnostic status logging parameters: Hour (VCU_LIGHT_STATUS)[cite: 1609, 1613].
External hardware sensor checking diagnostic status logging parameters: Minute (VCU_LIGHT_STATUS)[cite: 1609, 1613].
External hardware sensor checking diagnostic status logging parameters: Second (VCU_LIGHT_STATUS)[cite: 1609, 1613].
Bit 0: Driving Head, Bit 1: Front Fog Environment, Bit 2: Rear Active Brake light output current status[cite: 1609, 1610].
